title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.45 — CHASSIS THEME TOGGLE PREP + PHASE A CLOSED (user picked HYBRID R-D navy-in-green, wants a toggle to R-B reactor-green; then Phase B). PHASE A (photoreal pipeline PROVEN): Blender installed; headless bpy scene (scratchpad creosote_scene.py, backed up in CONTEXT_BACKUPS .../photoreal-phase-a/) builds a GRIT-like panel under the research rig (ONE warm shadow-casting key, cool no-shadow fill, dim warm world, AgX, ortho camera, Cycles); 4 comps rendered (navy/green/cream/HYBRID) — the SAME grey-green that failed flat in CSS reads as real painted steel under baked light, proving the v0.4.43 postmortem. Renders in the chassis artifact (label hybrid-confirmed). Scene gotcha: primitive_cube_add(size=1) spans +/-0.5 — scale by FULL extents. NEW IN BUILD: UI_THEME param (0=HYBRID default, 1=GREEN; UI-only, never read by DSP), CHASSIS toggle on TWEAK>MASTER at +745 (HYBRID/GREEN cycle), interim preview tints the dark chassis toward deep green-grey on GREEN (real plates land in Phase B), editor timer watches the param for repaint. PHASE B (next): extend the bpy scene to ALL panels using the layout-coordinate extraction (agent running), bake plate sets for BOTH themes at @1x/@2x, button-state renders + tile lit-strips, aging pass baked in, JUCE integration (ImageCache + ScaledImage + setOpaque plate components, procedural text/glow/needles on top, theme resolver keyed on UI_THEME). OPEN: LIMITER rename.
